description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the tmaier/docker-compose:latest Docker image with a docker:dind service and sets DOCKER_DRIVER=overlay2. Define a single test stage and three jobs: test_api, test_app, and test_e2e. In test_api run "docker-compose -f ci-composer.yml up --build -d" then "docker-compose -f ci-composer.yml exec -T api bundle exec rake test". In test_app run "docker-compose -f ci-composer.yml up --build -d" then "docker-compose -f ci-composer.yml exec -T app npm run test-all". In test_e2e run "docker-compose -f ci-composer.yml up --build -d", then "docker-compose -f ci-composer.yml exec -T app npm run build-e2e" and finally "docker-compose -f ci-composer.yml exec -T e2e npm run test". All jobs run in the test stage with no additional caches, artifacts, or rules.
